candidate_definition_hints.text: [CVPR'25 Oral] MoGe: Unlocking Accurate Monocular Geometry Estimation for Open-Domain Images with Optimal Training Supervision

MoGe is a powerful model for recovering 3D geometry from monocular open-domain images, including metric point maps, metric depth maps, normal maps and camera FOV. ***Check our websites ([MoGe-1](https://wangrc.site/MoGePage), [MoGe-2](https://wangrc.site/MoGe2Page)) for videos a…
